product.name: DEKS Rapid Flash EPDM Pipe Flashing for Metal & Tiled Roofs
product.description: This DEKS Rapid Flash is a smart lead-free alternative to traditional lead-based flashings. It comes equipped with a unique stretchable base that suits all roof profiles and can be used on both metal and tile roofs. You can also trim the rubber to fit different pipe sizes.This DEKS Rapid Flash incorporates a cleverly designed mesh, free from toxic materials, and a paintable surface you can customise to suit different roof colours.Features & Benefits: DEKS Rapid Flash EPDM Pipe Flashing for Metal & Tiled RoofsRobust lead-free EPDM flashingFully adhesive baseUV-ratedPaintable surfaceSuitable for all roof profilesMarket-leading sealing systemAvailable in a range of sizes to fit your pipe diameterThis DEKS Rapid Flash is simple to install and suitable for a roof pitch between 0° and 45°. What's more, it requires minimal tools and reduces installation time by half compared to traditional lead-based solutions.

product.name: Deks Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing - 4000mm
product.description: This Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing by Deks is an ideal replacement for lead. It's a UV-resistant, environmentally friendly composite consisting of embedded aluminium mesh into a special type of polymer rubber. It offers the same functionality as lead and has excellent stretchability.What's more, this Perform Flashing acts as a breathable covering that prevents condensation from forming. It is also non-toxic, less heavy than lead and abides by the latest health and safety regulations. These features make the material suitable for flashing various structures, including carports, conservatories and extensions. It is available in multiple sizes for extra flexibility.Features & Benefits: Deks Black Perform Flexible Lead Alternative Flashing - 4000mmLightweight and easy to handleNon-lead flashing in BlackNo scrap value to potential thievesGreat form stability, easily cut and dressedUse full roll without need for expansion jointsStretches up to 60% in width and 20% in lengthIdeal for box or valley guttersPlease note: Items do not come supplied with fixing kits - these are to be purchased separately.

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector in Brown
product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector is designed to efficiently divert rainwater from a horizontal square angle drain connector to a vertical downpipe. Available in cross-sections of 65mm x 100mm and 100mm x 100mm, with outlet diameters of 80mm or 100 mm, this connector ensures seamless integration with standard rainwater systems.Its sleek, linear design without grooves provides an aesthetically pleasing finish, making it suitable for high-quality buildings. Four internal wings securely attach the connector to the drain, preventing warping over time, while the dark brown colour blends neatly with commercially available rainwater pipes. Resistant to sun, ozone, atmospheric chemicals, and extreme temperatures, the connector maintains its flexibility and mechanical properties for long-term durability.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Horizontal Parapet Drain Angled Pipe Connector in BrownDiverts rainwater efficiently from horizontal drains to vertical downpipesSleek, groove-free design with internal wings to prevent deformationResistant to sun, ozone, chemicals, and maintains flexibility in low temperatures

product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDM
product.description: The DEKS EPDM Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain is a durable and flexible connector designed to link waterproof roof membranes to rainwater drains positioned near walls. Made from high-quality EPDM, it ensures long-lasting watertight performance and excellent resistance to sun and ozone. The slightly angled flange simplifies installation when fitting the connector to a roof fall, while the smooth surface guarantees a perfect bond with EPDM synthetic membranes.Its elastic material provides excellent flexibility even at low temperatures, and the 425mm long tube allows walls up to 400mm to be crossed. Compatible with prefabricated EPDM sheets and corner fittings with watertight gaskets, this connector can be positioned horizontally or vertically, making it ideal for flat roof drainage applications. Proper cleaning around the connection area ensures optimal sealing and performance.Features & Benefits: DEKS Flat Roof Round Horizontal Parapet Drain - Black EPDMEPDM construction ensures long-term watertightness and chemical resistanceSmooth flange for perfect bonding with EPDM membranesFlexible design allows installation horizontally or vertically and crossing walls up to 400mm

product.description:
The DEKS Flat Roof Square Horizontal Parapet Drain is a high-quality connector designed to link flat roof drainage systems to rainwater downpipes through walls. product.name: DEKS Flat Roof Round Roof Drain Outlet - Black EPDM
product.description: The DEKS Flat Roof Round Roof Drain Outlet is engineered to deliver reliable, long-lasting drainage performance for flat roofing systems. Made from high-quality, flexible EPDM polymers, it ensures a fully bonded, watertight connection between roofing membranes and rainwater downpipes. Its slightly conical spigot allows secure installation into pipes of varying sizes, for an efficient, hassle-free fit.Designed with practicality in mind, the outlet features internal ribs that provide a strong grip for post-fitted accessories such as leaf guards or gravel excluders, keeping systems clear and efficient. product.description: Engineered for use with bituminous membranes, this black TPE round roof drain outlet combines strength, flexibility, and durability in one simple solution. product.description: The DEKS Pedestal Slope Regulator is designed to ensure perfectly level surfaces when installing raised floors or decking on sloping substrates. product.name: Clearwater Shallow Dig Cesspool
product.description:
Clearwater shallow dig cesspools are a great option for off-mains buildings where the surrounding area means it’s not possible to install a soakaway to go hand in hand with a septic tank or sewage treatment plant. Clearwater cesspools are for use in situations where there is a high winter water table, where the area of installation is a protected zone or if the soil it will be installed in to is the wrong type to allow a drainage field to be installed.
These shallow dig cesspools have 1 inlet and a lid, which can be removed for the contents to be pumped out by a specialist operator. As a total containment tank, these shallow dig cesspools from Clearwater can be used for the storage of surface water, animal waste, as rainwater harvesting reservoirs and as firefighting reservoirs in areas where there are no mains connections. This cesspool cannot be used for the storage of drinking water.
By opting for this Clearwater shallow dig cesspool labour costs and installation time is minimised as less ground needs to be excavated. Manufactured from chemically resistant and watertight GRP, on dry sites these cesspools can be backfilled with pea shingles with no concerns over durability or stability on the cesspool.
Please note: For collecting and storing the effluence of a domestic, commercial or industrial building, the smallest capacity cesspool that must be used, to comply with building regulations, is 18000 litres.
product.variant_name: Clearwater Shallow Dig Cesspool - 2800 litres

product.name: Clearwater Shallow Dig Septic Tank
product.description:
Clearwater shallow dig septic tanks are the perfect choice for when sewage treatment plants, which discharge cleaned effluent into the ground, are not suitable. Throughout the Clearwater septic tank range, this is the highest capacity tank and it can store the effluent of up to 47 people, perfect for off-mains domestic properties, holiday homes and static caravans.
To reduce costs and installation time this septic tank is shallow dig, meaning you need to excavate less of the ground where it will be installed. Save on labour costs even more on dry sites too as this septic tank can be backfilled with pea shingles. There’s no need to worry about the durability of this septic tank with pea shingles or concrete backfill as it’s manufactured from strong, chemically resistant and watertight GRP.
99.7% efficient and approved to EN12566-1, these septic tanks are the perfect upgrade from traditional cesspools as they tend to last longer, increase hygiene and have improved efficiency in the treatment of waste.

product.name: Clearwater Alpha Spherical Onion Septic Tank with A15 Lid
product.description:
The Clearwater Alpha range of Septic Tanks only provides settlement for sewage solids. The liquid overflow requires further biological treatment in a suitably designed, correctly situated drainage field. This septic tank from Clearwater comes with an A15 load class lid.

Made from composite GRP - strong, light, chemically resistant and watertight
Press moulded shape provides wide, squat, form which makes the tank easy to install and handle
Stable base for storage
Shackles are provided to aid lifting and positioning within the excavation
All unit volumes are designed in accordance with the recommendations given in BS 6297:1983
The new manufacturing process minimises styrene emissions and reduces waste - all the better for our environment

product.name: Clearwater BioAir 2 Sewage Treatment Plant 6 Person (MDPE)
product.description: The Kingspan Clearwater BioAir 2 is a state-of-the-art sewage treatment plant designed to provide efficient, reliable, and environmentally friendly wastewater management for homes, small offices, farms, and barn conversions. Utilising advanced aerated technology, it delivers a superior level of water discharge quality (BOD5 97.5%) while ensuring compliance with EN 12566-3 standards.Its lightweight yet durable MDPE construction makes installation simple and cost-effective, even in challenging ground conditions. The Clearwater BioAir 2 is ideal for shallow dig installations and low-visibility applications, blending seamlessly into its surroundings. Additionally, its lockable child-proof cover makes it suitable for households with children and pets.Features & Benefits: Clearwater BioAir 2 Sewage Treatment Plant 6 Person (MDPE)Aerated technology for superior effluent quality (BOD5 97.5%) Supplied with an isolator switch1-year warrantyPlease note: The unit can be installed in low-traffic areas or reinforced for vehicle-bearing zones (subject to structural design considerations).

product.description: Designed for larger households, businesses, farms, and rural developments, the Kingspan Clearwater BioAir 7 is a powerful and eco-conscious sewage treatment solution built to handle the wastewater needs of up to 25 occupants. product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling Offset
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling Offset is designed to meet and surpass the strict demands of the drainage industry, offering a solution for various adaptation needs. It features a uniquely designed elastomeric sleeve with different diameters at each end for a secure and reliable seal. Equipped with two stainless steel clamping bands, it provides an effective method of connecting pipes with varying outside diameters, eliminating the need for additional bushings.These adaptor couplings are compatible with both traditional and modern pipe systems, including structural walled plastic pipes. The clamping band securely fastens to two or more external ribs on the plastic ribbed pipe, ensuring a reliable seal regardless of the coupling's position or movement.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling OffsetDurable, high-performance coupling which provides a reliable sealManufactured from EPDM Stainless steel shear band for resistance to heavy loads and shear forces 50-year manufacturer's guarantee Complies with WIS 4-41-01 Shear band ensures joint flexibility and pipe alignmentNo need for grouting in most applicationsAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco PVC TA Saddle Branch Lateral Connection Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco PVC TA Saddle 90 Degree Branch Lateral Connection Coupling is the ideal solution for effortlessly connecting a lateral pipe to a larger smooth wall pipe of various materials, including concrete, vitrified clay and PVC. Designed to be highly adaptable, this coupling is offered for both 45° and 90° lateral connections and is available in various sizes. It guarantees resilience under internal pressure up to 0.5 bar.Highly versatile, this EPDM coupling can be utilised with pipes of any wall thickness. product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor Coupling
product.description: Designed to meet and surpass the rigorous requirements of the drainage marketplace, this adaptor coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) delivers a solution for numerous adaptation situations. It can be used to connect pipelines that are different materials such as metal, cast iron and vitrified clay pipes.Including a step-moulded elastomeric sleeve with differing diameters at each end, this adaptor coupling is fitted with two stainless steel clamping bands that offer an effective method for joining pipes that have various outer diameters. This ensures it is cost-effective, eliminating potential bush requirements. It is also suitable for connecting all new and traditional pipe systems including structural walled plastic pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Adaptor CouplingRange of diameters availableHigh-performance sealing qualitiesEradicates the need for grouting in most applicationsShear band ensures pipe alignment and joint flexibilityComplies with WIS 4-41-01 for all public sewers and sewers for adoptionReduces excavation workStainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to shear forces and heavy loadsDurable design with a reliable seal50-year manufacturer's guaranteeSpecial ranges of adaptor couplings integrate an extra wide clamping band at one end and are also available for ribbed pipe systems. The clamping band fastens against two or more external ribs on the plastic ribbed pipe to ensure a high-performance seal regardless of the coupling movement or position.

product.name: Fernco ICON 4 Inch Internal Push Fit Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, these innovative Fernco ICON push-fit couplings are ideal for connecting pipes on the interior where external couplings might pose challenges. Manufactured from robust EPDM, these couplings guarantee outstanding performance, addressing various obstacles encountered in pipework. This makes them an ideal solution for connecting partially buried pipes, pipes sheared too close to a surface or those with concrete flat bottoms.Achieve a secure, watertight, and permanent connection effortlessly in just about 30 seconds, with no need for any tools. The versatility of this internal coupling is unparalleled. It passes rigorous pressure tests and seamlessly accommodates pipes made of any material. Ideal for temporary applications, the product can be conveniently removed and reused elsewhere without any complications.Features & Benefits: Fernco ICON 4 Inch Internal Push Fit Drain Pipe CouplingRobust EPDM couplings for connecting pipes with different sizesSuitable for use with partially buried pipes & pipes close to a surfaceQuick & easy to fitHighly versatile & suitable for use with any pipe materialAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe Coupling is an innovative EPDM coupling designed to create a reliable and lasting seal between two pipes. Benefitting from an internal circular profile, this coupling ensures a watertight and airtight connection that remains secure and permanent, catering to pipes ranging from DN150 to DN400.To enhance its versatility and adaptability, specially designed bushes are now available to complement these couplings. This allows for seamless connections between a wide range of pipe combinations. Even when dealing with pipes of irregular or inaccessible external profiles, the endlessly versatile ICON coupling offers the same ease of use as any of our other flexible couplings, ensuring a secure bond between the pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco ICON Flexible Internal Drain Pipe CouplingSturdy EPDM coupling for reliable and lasting pipe sealsProvides watertight and airtight connection for DN150 to DN400 pipesSecure bond even with irregular or inaccessible external profilesOptimal performance and reliability assured for pipe connectionsAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco Rubber Flexible Standard Drainage Couplings are designed for connecting and repairing pipelines with different diameters in sewerage, drainage and underground applications, regardless of the material or size variations. The highly versatile couplings' robust design and exceptional sealing properties ensure a reliable seal on rough pipe surfaces like concrete and deliver high-performance sealing on smoother surfaces like PVCu.In instances where excavation is necessary to fix damaged pipes, these robust EPDM couplings significantly reduce repair time and accommodate minor differences in pipe diameter. For larger diameter variations, a suitably sized bush can be used for proper installation.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage CouplingDurable design for a high-performance & reliable sealMade from EPDM with stainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to heavy loads and shear forcesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceReduces excavation workCompliant with WIS 4-41-01 (all public sewers and sewers for adoption) High-performance sealing properties eliminate the need for grouting in most applications

For larger diameter variations, a suitably sized bush can be used for proper installation.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Underground Standard Drainage CouplingDurable design for a high-performance & reliable sealMade from EPDM with stainless steel shear band for excellent resistance to heavy loads and shear forcesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceReduces excavation workCompliant with WIS 4-41-01 (all public sewers and sewers for adoption) High-performance sealing properties eliminate the need for grouting in most applications

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco flexible drain couplings serve a specific purpose in drain construction, particularly in scenarios where the resistance to earth loads, typically provided by standard couplings, is not required. These couplings play a crucial role in connecting repairing and maintaining drainage systems, as well as other small-diameter non-pressure pipelines. They feature a moulded elastomeric sleeve, securely fastened using medium-duty stainless steel clamping bands at both ends.These drain couplings are highly versatile and can accommodate various pipe materials, and they can also be supplied with nitrile sleeves for specific applications. Additionally, their design ensures ease of installation, as they simply slide onto the damaged pipe, resulting in an efficient and watertight solution. The couplings are also suitable for connecting short and cut lengths of pipe, making them an ideal choice for a wide range of applications.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe CouplingSturdy EPDM couplers suitable for a wide range of drainage applications Low-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsQuick & easy to install without the need for extra toolsSuitable for connecting plain-ended, short and cut pipesSuitable for use as an adaptor between pipes of different materials and similar sizes when fitted with a bushAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, the Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing Couplings are used to connect, repair and maintain drainage systems and small-diameter non-pressure pipelines. They consist of a moulded elastomeric sleeve, which is attached using medium-duty stainless steel clamping bands at both ends. The couplings are suitable for connecting plain-ended pipes, conducting repairs on existing pipe systems by replacing short sections, and joining short and cut lengths of pipe.The drain couplings come in various sizes to accommodate any pipe material with an outside diameter of up to 275mm, and there is also an option to obtain them with nitrile sleeves. What's more, they can be utilised as adaptors between pipes made of different materials and similar sizes when used in combination with a Fernco Bush.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing CouplingHigh-performance EPDM drain couplingLow-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsSlides on to the damaged pipe for quick & easy installationEfficient & watertight solutionAvailable in multiple sizes

The couplings are suitable for connecting plain-ended pipes, conducting repairs on existing pipe systems by replacing short sections, and joining short and cut lengths of pipe.The drain couplings come in various sizes to accommodate any pipe material with an outside diameter of up to 275mm, and there is also an option to obtain them with nitrile sleeves. What's more, they can be utilised as adaptors between pipes made of different materials and similar sizes when used in combination with a Fernco Bush.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Straight Plumbing CouplingHigh-performance EPDM drain couplingLow-cost solution to damaged drainage systemsSlides on to the damaged pipe for quick & easy installationEfficient & watertight solutionAvailable in multiple sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco 67mm to 76mm Rubber Flexible Drainage Drain Pipe Coupling

product.name: Fernco Puddle Flange for Drain Pipes
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, Fernco Puddle Flanges serve the purpose of sealing the area around pipes that pass through concrete structures like tanks, manhole chambers, shafts, floor slabs and basements. Manufactured from sturdy EPDM, these reliable flanges are typically installed during the construction phase.When pipes pass through concrete, they do not bond to the concrete, creating a potential route for water to flow along the external surface of the pipe. However, Fernco Puddle Flanges act as a barrier, preventing water penetration in such situations. The flange is clamped onto the pipe, obstructing this direct water route. During the pouring process, the seal body is compressed, and if the concrete shrinks during curing, the rubber in the flange relaxes and maintains a seal, preventing any water flow along this path.Features & Benefits: Fernco Puddle Flange for Drain PipesHighly versatile, cost-effective solution for sealing pipes which pass through concreteSuitable for use in walls, floors and ceilingsGood chemical resistanceQuick & easy to installAvailable in a wide range of sizes
product.variant_name: Fernco Puddle Flange for Pipes 30mm to 34mm

product.name: DEKS Landscaping General X Shaped Tile Spacers - Pack of 200
product.description: The DEKS X Shaped Tile Spacers are the essential tool for achieving precise, professional-looking tile layouts. Designed for versatility, these spacers support grout lines from 0.5mm to 3mm, making them perfect for everything from sleek, modern finishes to traditional installations. Their cross shape ensures tiles stay evenly spaced on all four sides, maintaining perfect alignment across walls and floors.Made from durable, reusable plastic, these spacers are built to withstand repeated use while helping you save time and effort on every project. product.name: Fernco Rubber External Flexible Drainage Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, these Fernco Large Diameter Standard Couplings are designed to fit any outside pipe diameter across sewerage, drainage and low-pressure applications. Manufactured from EPDM, these large-diameter standard couplings are designed to cater to the specific needs of contractors and various job sites. With their unique bolting system, the couplings provide a secure and reliable joint solution.These large-diameter couplings from Fernco can be effectively used with all common pipe materials, making them an incredibly versatile solution suitable for use in a wide range of applications in the construction, repair and maintenance of pipelines. Installation is a breeze, offering easy and hassle-free fitting while ensuring a watertight connection.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber External Flexible Drainage CouplingRobust large-diameter EPDM couplingSuitable for use with all pipe materials (clay, concrete, cast and ductile iron, asbestos/cement, plastic or fibreglass)Provides a strong watertight connectionAvailable in a wide range of larger sizes for greater convenienceUnique bolting system for a reliable & secure joint

product.name: Fernco Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage Coupling
product.description: The Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage Coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) is designed for use in diverse sewerage and drainage as well as non- and low-pressure applications. A highly versatile solution, it can be used with any pipe material. The increased width offers enhanced tolerance when cutting the pipe ends and allows for greater freedom of movement during ground settlement. Moreover, these couplings exhibit impressive durability, withstanding pressures of up to 4 bar, depending on the diameter.Manufactured from BS EN681-1 EPDM rubber, the Magnum Couplings are designed for robustness and reliability. They are also equipped with Grade 1.4301 (304) stainless steel clamps and shear bands, ensuring secure and lasting connections even when subject to heavy loads.Features & Benefits: Fernco Magnum Rubber Flexible Drainage CouplingDurable EPDM coupling for a reliable & secure connectionCan be used with any pipe materialStainless steel shear band for improved resistance to shear forces & heavy loadsShear band ensures joint integrity & pipe alignment under heavy loadsAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco EPDM Moulded Drain Pipe Bush
product.description: These moulded bushes from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) consist of EPDM rubber rings that serve as supplementary components for Shear Banded Couplings or Lateral Connection Saddles. They are utilised when the outside diameter of a pipe needs to be increased to match the requirements of the coupling or saddle being used.By filling the space between the pipe's outer surface and the inside of the coupling, the bush ensures a proper and secure connection for low-pressure pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Moulded Drain Pipe BushDesigned for use when outside pipe diameters are significantly differentProvide a high-performance seal on low-pressure pipesManufactured to meet the WIS standard 92-102 to 115mmCompliant with BS EN 681-1Available in a wide range of sizesManufactured from EPDM for robustness and reliability

They are utilised when the outside diameter of a pipe needs to be increased to match the requirements of the coupling or saddle being used.By filling the space between the pipe's outer surface and the inside of the coupling, the bush ensures a proper and secure connection for low-pressure pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Moulded Drain Pipe BushDesigned for use when outside pipe diameters are significantly differentProvide a high-performance seal on low-pressure pipesManufactured to meet the WIS standard 92-102 to 115mmCompliant with BS EN 681-1Available in a wide range of sizesManufactured from EPDM for robustness and reliability

product.name: Fernco EPDM Pipe Expansion Joint
product.description: This robust expansion joint from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) offers a one-piece design specifically tailored to handle the thermal expansion and contraction of vertical pipes in commercial and residential applications. A highly versatile and convenient solution, it can accommodate up to 1 1/2" of pipe expansion and 1/2" of contraction from their regular position.These EPDM expansion joints are an excellent alternative for DWV (Drain, Waste and Vent), with the innovative one-piece construction ensuring there are no moving parts that could potentially malfunction.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Pipe Expansion JointHigh-performance EPDM expansion joint suitable for use in domestic & commercial applicationsInnovative one-piece design ensures reliability and prevents malfunctioningPositive positioning internal stopsIdeal for drain, waste and vent stacks, and interior rainwater conductor systemsQuick & easy to installAvailable in several sizes

product.name: Fernco PVC Grey Plumbing Adaptor Coupling
product.description: This plumbing adaptor coupling from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) is ideal for connecting pipes with varying outside diameters, whether it's due to different pipe materials or sizes. Additionally, it is well-suited for use on smaller-diameter pipes in most low/non-pressure plumbing applications. The couplings are meticulously crafted from high-performance EPDM rubber, ensuring exceptional quality. As a standard feature, end clamps are made from grade 304 stainless steel.The installation process is quick and straightforward, providing a reliable and flexible seal that is both watertight and airtight. What's more, these couplings are designed to withstand a temperature range from -50°C to 150°C, ensuring their durability and performance even in challenging environments.Features & Benefits: Fernco PVC Grey Plumbing Adaptor CouplingProvides a reliable flexible watertight and airtight sealSuitable for use on any pipe materialIdeal for connecting incompatible pipe systems-50°C to 150°C temperature rangeManufactured from EPDM & stainless steel for high performanceQuick & easy to installAvailable in multiple sizes

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drain and Sewer Pipe Adaptor
product.description: These robust rubber flexible drain and sewer pipe adaptors from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) are designed for use in emergency situations for joining pipes with similar outside diameters, regardless of the pipe size or material involved. They are made from a durable thermoplastic compound, providing them with dimensional flexibility that ensures a leak-proof seal on a wide array of pipe materials. As a standard feature, end clamps are included and made from corrosion-resistant grade 1.4301 (304) stainless steel.What's more, the adaptors are well-suited for working in confined spaces, such as under a bath or shower tray. They are compatible with sanitary pipework, underground drainage, sewers and rainwater pipes.Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Drain and Sewer Pipe AdaptorQuick, versatile and easy-to-use solution to domestic drain, waste and vent plumbing problemsIdeal for emergency repairsSuitable for use with many pipe materialsProvides a watertight sealQuick & easy to install with a screwdriver, nut driver or socketIdeal for working in confined spacesHighly versatile and suitable for use with sanitary pipework, underground drainage, sewers and rainwater pipesPlease note: 1.4401 (316) stainless steel end clamps are available on request.

product.name: Fernco EPDM Moulded Bush Drain Pipe Adaptor Coupling
product.description: Formerly Flexseal, these Fernco Moulded Bushes are durable EPDM rubber rings designed as supplementary components for Shear Banded Couplings or Lateral Connection Saddles. Their purpose is to help connect pipes with different outside diameters. These robust rubber rings serve to increase the outside diameter of a pipe, ensuring a proper fit when the pipe is too small for the coupling or saddle being used. This convenient solution facilitates a reliable and high-performance seal.Once fitted, the bush effectively fills the gap between the outside of the pipe and the inside of the coupling, creating a secure and dependable connection. The Fernco Moulded Bushes play a crucial role in ensuring efficient and effective jointing, enabling smooth connections between pipes of varying sizes for a seamless and watertight seal.Features & Benefits: Fernco EPDM Moulded Bush Drain Pipe Adaptor CouplingVersatile EPDM bush for connecting pipes with significantly different outside diametersProvides a high-performance seal on low-pressure pipesAvailable in multiple sizes for greater convenienceManufactured to meet the WIS standardCompliant with BS EN 681-1

product.name: Fernco EPDM 90 Degree Flexible Rubber Drainage End Cap
product.description: These EPDM end caps from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) serve are designed specifically for capping pipe ends, cleanouts and open test pipes at a precise 90-degree angle. These highly adaptable end caps are suitable for both above- and below-ground applications and can be effectively used with pipes of any material. The unique convex face design ensures they can withstand higher pressure during testing, minimising ballooning and providing a secure and dependable sealing solution.A highly versatile solution, Fernco EPDM End Caps are available in a wide range of sizes, offering greater convenience for different pipe dimensions. product.name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve
product.description: Fernco's HDPE Penstock Valve is an effective solution for efficient water flow control in various applications, from waterways to power plants, hydropower stations, industrial effluent facilities, sewerage and wastewater treatment plants, as well as drainage and flood control projects. This permanent water gate enables you to take charge of water management, allowing you to manually adjust the flow of water to suit your specific needs.Compliant with DIN 19569-4 class 5 standards, the Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve is a reliable choice, making it an indispensable asset for civil engineering projects, channels, and wall apertures. Constructed from corrosion-resistant and UV-stable HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene), the Fernco Penstock Valve boasts enduring quality and durability, complemented by a sturdy stainless steel frame. What sets it apart is its lightweight design, significantly lighter than alternatives, ensuring hassle-free installation without the need for grout between the frame and wall. Features & Benefits: Fernco HDPE Penstock ValveOffers versatile water flow control in diverse applications, including waterways, power plants, flood control, and moreAllows manual adjustment for tailored water management solutionsComplies with DIN 19569-4 class 5 standardsManufactured from corrosion-resistant HDPE with a stainless steel frameLightweight design simplifies installationNo need for grout between wall and frameEnvironmentally friendly and fully recyclableLow-maintenanceIn addition to its operational excellence, this range of penstock valves is eco-conscious, being fully recyclable, contributing to a lower carbon footprint. Maintenance is minimal, requiring only a touch of lubrication between the frame and door, guaranteeing an extended product life. Standards & CertificationDIN Certified: DIN 19569-4 Class 5 Standards

product.name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set
product.description: Effortlessly control penstock valves with Fernco's Telescopic HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set. Ideal for below-ground or pit installations, these sets offer remote operation. Choose from a range of sizes to match your specific needs for seamless water flow management.To install your extension spindle, start by removing the BS cap. Then, place the extension spindle over the penstock spindle. Position the upper bracket 150mm below the deck or the top of the spindle extension. Divide the remaining brackets evenly over the length of the spindle extension, using one additional bracket for every 3m. Mark the mounting holes for the brackets to ensure the extension spindle is in the correct position. Remove the spindle extension and install the brackets as required. Finally, reinstall the spindle extension and adjust the bracket positions as needed to ensure proper alignment.Features & Benefits: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle SetAllows remote valve control of your penstockDesigned for below-ground or pit installationsVarious sizes available to suit specific requirementsSimplifies water flow managementQuick and easy installation
product.variant_name: Fernco HDPE Penstock Valve Extension Spindle Set - 500mm-750mm

product.name: Fernco HDPE Wall Mounted Flap Valve
product.description: Fernco's HDPE Wall Mounted Flap Valve ensures effective water flow management as part of your penstock system. These one-way valves, available in various sizes, safeguard against flooding by allowing downstream water to exit while preventing reverse flows. Manufactured from high-strength HDPE, these valves provide robust protection against rising water levels.Featuring integrated seals, including an EPDM lip seal for watertight security, these valves ensure reliable leakage prevention. Their UV-stable, corrosion-resistant design guarantees longevity and environmental responsibility, as they are fully recyclable. Installation is quick and hassle-free, requiring no grout is required, thanks to their robust construction.Features & Benefits: Fernco HDPE Wall Mounted Flap ValveAvailable in various sizesPrevents flooding by allowing downstream water exit while blocking reverse flowsManufactured from high-strength HDPEIntegrated seals, including an EPDM lip seal, ensure leak preventionUV-stable, corrosion-resistant design with full recyclabilityQuick, hassle-free installation without the need for groutMeets DIN 19569-4 standards, requiring minimal maintenance for reliable performanceThese Flap Valves meet DIN 19569-4 standards and demand little maintenance. With low cracking heads, they are engineered to deliver dependable performance, making them an ideal choice for water systems in various applications.Standards & CertificationDIN Certified: DIN 19569-4 Class 5 Standards

product.name: Fernco Single Flap Backwater Valve
product.description: Protect your property from the risks of backwater flooding with the Fernco Single Flap Backwater Valve. This valve is designed to prevent rainwater from entering the sewerage system, ensuring smooth wastewater drainage based on the slope of the rainwater drain. It comes equipped with stainless steel anti-flooding flaps and a smart body design that minimises blockages, making it an efficient rodent deterrent.Available in a broad range of sizes, it effortlessly integrates into wastewater networks with pipe diameters ranging from 110mm to 200mm. Rigorously tested for safety and compliant with BS EN 13564 standards, its robust design and maintenance-free operation guarantee peace of mind. Features & Benefits: Fernco Single Flap Backwater ValveA single-flap backwater valve designed to prevent backwater floodingSuitable for stormwater applicationsRainwater entry prevention ensures smooth wastewater drainageStainless steel anti-flooding flaps and blockage-minimising designsVersatile sizes for easy integration (110mm to 200mm pipes)Safety tested and BS EN 13564 compliantRobust, maintenance-free, and rodent-deterrent designStandards & CertificationBritish/European Standard: BS EN 13564
product.variant_name: Fernco Single Flap Backwater Valve - 110mm

product.name: Fernco Rubber Flexible Extra Wide Drainage Coupling
product.description: These extra-wide couplings from Fernco (formerly Flexseal) are designed for connecting large-diameter pipes of any material across a wide range of drainage applications. Manufactured from BS EN681-1 EPDM rubber, they feature grade 1-4301 stainless steel clamps and shear bands, which allows them to establish a high-performance seal on any pipe.What's more, these couplings allow for greater tolerance in cutting the pipe ends, facilitating an easier on-site installation. They also provide for the movement of pipes due to settlement or thermal effects, which makes them a reliable, safe and secure solution. Features & Benefits: Fernco Rubber Flexible Extra Wide Drainage CouplingProvides a high-performance seal on large-diameter pipelinesManufactured from EPDM rubber with grade 1-4301 stainless steel clamps and shear bands Exceptional reliability due to greater tolerance for pipe movementEasier installation due to increased tolerance on pipe ends

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Plastic 106mm Prostyle Gutter
product.description:
The sleek lines and modern styling of the Prostyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System provides a more contemporary finish with a quality cast iron look and feel.
Available in up to 4m lengths, the guttering must slope gently downwards at least 12mm every 3m towards the running outlet in order to provide effective drainage.
It should be fixed at 1m intervals with a gutter support bracket.
Offering a modern twist on heritage styling, the Prostyle system is ideally suited to traditionally styled new build projects.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Fascia Bracket
product.description:
An ideal fitting to go alongside your Prostyle plastic guttering, this Prostyle fascia bracket fastens against your fascia board to provide incredible support and unwavering assistance to your gutter runs while they collect water. 
This Cascade collection product from Brett Martin works hard and efficiently to keep your guttering stable and secure. While doing this, the cast iron style is appealing and sleek, particularly on newer applications where heritage-like build aesthetics are preferred. Both UV stabilised and resistant against corrosion and rusting, this fascia bracket strives to strengthen 106mm guttering and performs at its best when spaced out at 1m distances along the fascia board.  Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Fascia BracketHigh-quality detailing  Large colour palette  Affordable and strong uPVC plastic material  Ogee profile  Substitutes cast iron pipes  Versatile.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Running Outlet
product.description:
This Prostyle running outlet firmly situates itself between two different 106mm guttering runs and provides an access point (an outlet) for water to collect and stream down towards the downpipe, and ultimately the drainage systems below.
Brett Martin's Cascade guttering assortment delivers a set of cast iron-looking, sturdy, and unique uPVC plastic products that can efficiently relieve actual cast iron of its use - instead delivering a high-quality and advanced replacement that both resembles true cast iron and works well alongside it. This running outlet from the Prostyle collection is a useful addition to your guttering that has minimal risk of corrosion, leaks, and breakages. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Running OutletBroad shade range and commendable colour palette  106mm diameter  Straightforward attachments for quick installation  Robust but lightweight for reliable functions and easy handling  UV stabilized uPVC Cost-effective with long use  Exemplary choice for new or renovated builds with a timeless style.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Running Outlet
product.description:
This Prostyle running outlet firmly situates itself between two different 106mm guttering runs and provides an access point (an outlet) for water to collect and stream down towards the downpipe, and ultimately the drainage systems below.
Brett Martin's Cascade guttering assortment delivers a set of cast iron-looking, sturdy, and unique uPVC plastic products that can efficiently relieve actual cast iron of its use - instead delivering a high-quality and advanced replacement that both resembles true cast iron and works well alongside it. This running outlet from the Prostyle collection is a useful addition to your guttering that has minimal risk of corrosion, leaks, and breakages. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Running OutletBroad shade range and commendable colour palette  106mm diameter  Straightforward attachments for quick installation  Robust but lightweight for reliable functions and easy handling  UV stabilized uPVC Cost-effective with long use  Exemplary choice for new or renovated builds with a timeless style.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Plastic Prostyle Running Outlet - Green

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Union Bracket
product.description:
Taking a unique and contemporary spin on a traditional style of guttering, the Cascade Prostyle range from Brett Martin features this plastic union bracket that sturdily joins together two gutter parts.
As well as uniting two pieces of guttering, this iron style union bracket provides additional support to the given joints and attachments by screwing into the fascia board where necessary. It also aids tight seals to prevent leaks. With an ogee profile, this product works splendidly on systems that find refuge in heritage style applications that strive for a distinctive design while employing all the benefits of contemporary guttering expertise. The Cascade Prostyle range parallels regular cast iron systems and can be a perfect replacement. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Union BracketImpeccable colour variety to suit your preferences  Perfectly simple to apply  Can be put to great use in cast iron systems  Maintains a sleek finish  106mm  Non-corrodible and long-lasting, making for a cost-effective option.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Union Bracket - Black

product.name: Brett Martin Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Stopend
product.description:
Sits at the end of a run of guttering to close off a run of guttering. These stop ends are supplied as a ‘right’ or ‘left' end, depending on the layout.
Offering a modern twist on heritage styling, the Prostyle system is ideally suited to traditionally styled new build projects.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Stopend Outlet
product.description:
This cast iron style stop end outlet is designed to join onto the end of a gutter run and release the gathered rainwater into the connected downpipe, with either left or righthanded options purchasable. 
Cascade systems offer guttering items that take on a rustic and traditional design which can be used on both newer builds with unique styles and refurbished historical builds that require updated technology. Brett Martin manufactured this Prostyle uPVC plastic stopend outlet with a 106mm ogee profile gutter diameter to work in tandem with 65mm squared downpipes. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Stopend OutletVast colour selection to choose from  Durable and resistant to deterioration  106mm ogee profile  Effortless to install and ready to use  Affordable way of replacing genuine cast iron.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Stopend Outlet L/H - Black

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Stopend Outlet
product.description:
This cast iron style stop end outlet is designed to join onto the end of a gutter run and release the gathered rainwater into the connected downpipe, with either left or righthanded options purchasable. 
Cascade systems offer guttering items that take on a rustic and traditional design which can be used on both newer builds with unique styles and refurbished historical builds that require updated technology. Brett Martin manufactured this Prostyle uPVC plastic stopend outlet with a 106mm ogee profile gutter diameter to work in tandem with 65mm squared downpipes. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic External Angle
product.description:
With modern styling and sleek lines, this Prostyle Cast Iron Style external angle provides a quality Cast Iron Look and feel with a more contemporary finish and offers a modern twist on heritage styling. Ideal for traditionally styled new build projects, this external angle provides authentic detailing and finish to your building.
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System, this external angle is available in a range of angles to fit around corners or obtrusions of your building and a selection of colours to choose from to match your gutters and architectural needs. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 106mm Prostyle Plastic Fabricated Special Angle
product.description:
Allows a run of guttering to continue around a corner.
A gutter support bracket must be fixed within 150mm on both sides of the angle.
The Prostyle special angle is a specially made-to-order internal/external angle.
The sleek lines and modern styling of the Prostyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System provide a more contemporary finish with a quality Cast Iron look and feel.
Offering a modern twist on heritage styling, the Prostyle system is ideally suited to traditionally styled new build projects.
Please note, you will need to confirm the angle of which you require for this particular product
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 112mm Roundstyle Plastic Gutter
product.description:
Synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blending perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, this Roundstyle gutter is virtually indistinguishable from original Cast Iron guttering. As part of the Roundstyle Domestic Rainwater System, this gutter is authentically styled making it ideal for period styled new builds or renovation projects.
With authentic cast iron architectural detailing and finish, this gutter is available in a range of heritage colours and lengths to match your architectural needs and is fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System, traditional Cast Iron and existing rainwater systems. As an affordable cast iron alternative, this gutter is lightweight, ready to fit and quick and easy to install. Made from robust uPVC, this gutter is fully UV stabilised, corrosion-resistant and durable.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 112mm Roundstyle Plastic Fascia Bracket
product.description:
This Roundstyle fascia bracket firmly attaches to the fascia board of your home in order to support your 112mm diameter half round guttering run, therefore allowing rainwater to collect and drain efficiently. 
Brett Martin's Cascade range of cast iron style products is a diverse and versatile collection that comes in an array of colours to match your pre-existing or desired systems, all while replicating that classic and authentic-looking cast iron style that can replace real cast iron elements. Brilliant for contemporary renovations where historical aesthetics are required, the Cascade collection satiates this necessity and combines up-to-date benefits within its products and this fascia bracket follows without exclusion. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 112mm Roundstyle Plastic Running Outlet
product.description:
This Roundstyle uPVC plastic running outlet is a perfect match for your Brett Martin Cascade 112mm guttering system. By creating a solid connection between your guttering run and your downpipe, this outlet allows rainwater to be efficiently directed through the system and down to the drain. 
As a member of Brett Martin's innovative Cascade range, this running outlet takes on a traditional cast iron aesthetic that goes perfectly with historical-looking builds whether they be new or refurbished. While having this timeless finish, the Cascade range still maintains modern technology and gains all of the fantastic features and advantages of more contemporary products - including UV resistance, sturdy constructions, and easy installation. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 112mm Roundstyle Plastic Fabricated Special Angle
product.description:
This Roundstyle fabricated special angle works brilliantly to compensate for any corners or obstacles that may intrude on the guttering line and potentially obstruct the constant path for water to flow. 
With the highest efficiency in mind, Brett Martin created this Roundstyle special angle to accommodate specific needs in your guttering system. This made-to-fit product can be specially catered to the angle you require, making it unique and versatile, and therefore a perfect addition to your guttering - whether it be alongside items from the Cascade cast iron range or traditional cast iron products alike, this special angle provides you with a reliable and durable connection.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 112mm Roundstyle Plastic Fabricated Special AngleChoice of colours available to tie in with your system or desired aesthetic  A customisable option that meets your needs  Longevity uPVC plastic that deters corrosion and UV impairment  Suitable for new or recently refurbished builds, even with period styles  112mm. Please note: Include your desired angle in the 'Special Instructions' box during checkout.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Single Socket Soil Pipe
product.description: This single-socket soil pipe is part of the Push-fit Cast Iron Soil System with a realistic cast iron finish and traditional cast iron detailing to complement renovation or new build projects for traditionally designed buildings. Quick and easy to install with a convenient Push-fit installation and maximum durability, this soil pipe requires minimal maintenance.Fully sealed with long-lasting rubber seals, retained by strong snap caps, this soil pipe is made from durable, non-corrosive and UV stabilised uPVC for a secure and reliable installation. This soil pipe is a lightweight, affordable alternative to cast iron and is available in a variety of heritage colours to match your rainwater and soil systems. Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Domestic and High Capacity Rainwater systems and part of other soil systems, this soil pipe can integrate at ground level with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems. This single-socket soil pipe is 2.5m long and has a 110mm diameter.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Single Socket Soil PipeCompatible with the Cast Iron Style rainwater systems, traditional Cast Iron and other soil systems  Part of the Push-Fit 110mm Cast Iron Style Soil System and can be integrated with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems at ground level  Affordable alternative to cast iron with authentic detailing and finish of traditional cast iron systems  Lightweight, ready to fit and quick and easy to install with minimal maintenance needed  Available in a range of heritage colours to match your rainwater and soil system  Fully sealed Cast Iron Style Push-fit Soil System with long-lasting rubber seals for maximum durability and reliability  Made from durable, non-corrosive and fully UV stabilised uPVC  Made in accordance with British Standards

With long-lasting rubber seals, retained by strong snap caps, this durable uPVC socket bend is corrosion resistant and fully UV stabilised for a reliable and secure installation. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 92.5 Degree Double Socket Plain Branch
product.description:
This 92.5° double socket plain branch is an excellent example of Brett Martin's solid and stylish 'Cascade' range of rainwater products, pairing an authentic cast-iron look with strong, reliable modern materials. This plain branch is ideal for domestic rainwater systems, sporting a range of popular colours and standard sizes. Cost-effective, authentically designed, and with longevity in mind, this pipe branch is ideal for a range of repairs, refits, and ground-up builds across your next guttering project.With detailed finishes that really resemble cast iron, this double socket branch is a cost-effective alternative that features the contemporary technology of modern plastic fittings.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 92.5 Degree Double Socket Plain BranchA range of popular colours and offsets availableAuthentic details with a cast iron style and finishPush-fit design makes for quick and easy installationPart of a fully sealed, reliable rainwater systemCompatible with the rest of the Cascade rainwater system as well as traditional cast iron

This 92.5° double socket plain branch is an excellent example of Brett Martin's solid and stylish 'Cascade' range of rainwater products, pairing an authentic cast-iron look with strong, reliable modern materials. This plain branch is ideal for domestic rainwater systems, sporting a range of popular colours and standard sizes. Cost-effective, authentically designed, and with longevity in mind, this pipe branch is ideal for a range of repairs, refits, and ground-up builds across your next guttering project.With detailed finishes that really resemble cast iron, this double socket branch is a cost-effective alternative that features the contemporary technology of modern plastic fittings.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 92.5 Degree Double Socket Plain BranchA range of popular colours and offsets availableAuthentic details with a cast iron style and finishPush-fit design makes for quick and easy installationPart of a fully sealed, reliable rainwater systemCompatible with the rest of the Cascade rainwater system as well as traditional cast iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Soil Pipe and Socket Bracket
product.description: From Brett Martin's innovative Cascade Cast Iron Style soil range, this pipe bracket is fully supportive of the 110mm push-fit soil pipes. Complementary to the Cast Iron Style Domestic and High Capacity Rainwater Systems, this bracket has been designed with a realistic cast iron finish, incorporating traditional cast iron detailing with the benefits of a plastic system as a cost-effective and lighter alternative.Quick and effortless to fit, this bracket provides a secure and reliable installation and can fully integrate with the Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems with a wide range of colours to choose from to match. This versatile bracket is ideal for new build or renovation projects.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Soil Pipe and Socket BracketAuthentic architectural detailing of cast ironAffordable and lightweight alternative to cast ironQuick and easy to installPart of a convenient push-fit systemVariety of heritage coloursFully UV stabilisedReady to fitRobust uPVC materialCorrosion resistant and durableCompatible with Brett Martin's comprehensive Cascade Cast Iron Style range

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Access Pipe
product.description:
To complement Cast Iron Style Domestic and High Capacity Rainwater Systems, the Cascade range includes a comprehensive 110mm Cast Iron Style Soil System with a realistic cast iron finish.
Designed to incorporate traditional cast iron detailing with all the benefits of a plastic system, the Cast Iron Style Soil System completes the range providing a cost effective alternative to Cast Iron in renovation or new build projects.
Features

110mm soil pipe, soil stack shroud, access fittings and adaptors.
Authentic detailing and finish on downpipe, shroud, clips and fittings.
Convenient push-fit installation.
Fully sealed, reliable system. 
Fully compatible with the Cascade Cast Iron Style Rainwater Systems and traditional Cast Iron.
Integrates with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Single Socket Access Bend
product.description: This single socket access bend works fantastically in soil and waste systems where a 92.5º angle is needed. It also features an access point for easily clearing away any blockages that may occur. Designed for making sturdy connections with one end of the bend featuring a socket seal and the other ready to be sealed into another socket, Brett Martin strategically created this innovative single socket access bend to replicate genuine cast iron systems like the other items in the impressive Cascade range. It is durable and lightweight for straightforward installations that are only made easier with simple and efficient push-fit connections.  Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Single Socket Access BendIncludes a comprehensive colour range  Suited to builds that acquire modern twists on archaic styles  Reliable push-fit seals  Can be used with other systems  110mm.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm 92.5dg Single Socket Access Bend (Black)

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 92.5 Degree Double Socket Boss Branch
product.description: Designed with long-lasting rubber seals, retained by strong snap caps, this double socket boss branch is quick and easy to install with a convenient Push-fit installation for prolonged reliability and minimal maintenance. Perfect for connecting multiple soil pipes in a soil system, this branch is available in a range of heritage colours to match your soil and rainwater systems.Providing the authentic detailing and finish of traditional cast-iron soil systems of heritage designed buildings, this branch is a lightweight, affordable alternative to cast iron, making it cost-effective and easy to handle. Made from robust uPVC, this branch is durable, corrosion-resistant and UV stabilised ensuring a secure and reliable installation. Fully complementing the Cast Iron Style High Capacity and Domestic Rainwater systems, this branch is part of the Push-fit Cast Iron Soil System and can be integrated into the Brett Martin Underground Drainage System at ground level. Fully compatible with other soil systems, this branch provides maximum durability and is ideal for renovation or new build projects.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 92.5 Degree Double Socket Boss BranchCan be integrated at ground level with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems as part of the Push-Fit 110mm Cast Iron Style Soil System  Fully compatible with traditional Cast Iron, the Cast Iron Style rainwater systems and other soil systems  Lightweight, affordable alternative to cast iron with authentic detailing and finish of traditional cast iron systems  Available in a variety of heritage colours to match your soil and rainwater system  Ready to fit, quick and easy to install with the convenience of Push-fit installations  Made from robust, non-corrodible and UV resistant uPVC with minimal maintenance requirements  Fully sealed Cast Iron Style Push-fit Soil System with long-lasting rubber seals for a reliable system  Manufactured to British Standards

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Double Socket Bend
product.description: With a choice of 92.5º angle or 135º angle available, depending on your personal requirements, this double socket bend is a versatile and exceptionally useful product for your push-fit soil systems.The Cascade iron style range from Brett Martin includes a selection of push-fit soil products that are lightweight and provide straightforward but still reliable connections, and this double socket bend is just one of those multiple products. Equipped with two socket seals on either end of the bend, you can connect two pipes or fittings (without socket seals) while changing the angle at the very same time.  Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Double Socket BendSeveral colours to choose from, all completed with a cast iron style finish  Doesn't hinder under UV or weather conditions  Appropriate to use with Brett Martin's Underground Drainage Systems  Particularly suited to new or renovated builds  Push-fit connections.

product.description: With a choice of 92.5º angle or 135º angle available, depending on your personal requirements, this double socket bend is a versatile and exceptionally useful product for your push-fit soil systems.The Cascade iron style range from Brett Martin includes a selection of push-fit soil products that are lightweight and provide straightforward but still reliable connections, and this double socket bend is just one of those multiple products. Equipped with two socket seals on either end of the bend, you can connect two pipes or fittings (without socket seals) while changing the angle at the very same time.  Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Double Socket BendSeveral colours to choose from, all completed with a cast iron style finish  Doesn't hinder under UV or weather conditions  Appropriate to use with Brett Martin's Underground Drainage Systems  Particularly suited to new or renovated builds  Push-fit connections.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 500mm Offset Section Pipe
product.description:
This offset pipe is part of Brett Martin's excellent 'Cascade' range of rainwater products, combining an authentic cast-iron traditional look with the clear convenience of modern materials. This offset section pipe is a perfect pairing for domestic rainwater systems, sporting a range of popular colours and standard sizes. Cost-effective, authentically designed, and with longevity in mind, this offset pipe is ideal for a range of repairs, refits, and ground up builds across your next guttering project.Both cost-effective and authentically designed, this offset pipe imitates genuine cast iron while incorporating the benefits of modern plastic systems. It is perfect for use in both renovated and new build projects.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic 500mm Offset Section PipeA range of popular colours and offsets availableAuthentic details with a cast iron style and finishPush-fit design makes for quick and easy installationPart of a fully sealed, reliable rainwater systemCompatible with the rest of the Cascade rainwater system as well as traditional cast ironCan be easily integrated with Brett Martin's Underground Drainage systems

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Optional Socket Shroud with Lugs
product.description: As part of the comprehensive Push-Fit Cast Iron Soil System, this socket shroud provides cover for the socket joins for a sleek aesthetic with a realistic cast iron finish. Complementing the Cast Iron Style Domestic and High Capacity Rainwater Systems, this socket shroud can be fully integrated into the Brett Martin Underground Drainage System.With all the benefits of a uPVC system, this socket shroud also incorporates the traditional cast-iron detailing as an affordable, lightweight alternative. Available in a variety of heritage colours to match your rainwater and soil system, this socket shroud complements the authentic detailing and finish of traditionally styled buildings. This durable uPVC socket shroud is robust, non-corrodible and UV resistant with minimal maintenance needed after installation. Quick and easy to install for a safe and reliable installation, this socket shroud offers maximum durability and is fully compatible with other soil systems. This socket shroud is perfect for renovation or new build projects.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Optional Socket Shroud with LugsPart of the Push-Fit Cast Iron Style Soil range and can integrate with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems  Compatible with other soil systems, the Cast Iron Style rainwater systems and traditional Cast Iron  Affordable, lightweight alternative to cast iron  Available in a range of heritage colours to choose from  Ready to fit, easy and quick to install with minimal maintenance requirements  Made from durable, non-corrosive and UV stabilised uPVC  Safe, secure and reliable installation  Authentic detailing and finish of cast-iron architectural designs  Fully sealed Cast Iron Style Push-fit Soil System for a reliable and convenient system  Made to British Standards

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 110mm Plastic Optional Socket Shroud
product.description:
To complement Cast Iron Style Domestic and High Capacity Rainwater Systems, the Cascade range includes a comprehensive 110mm Cast Iron Style Soil System with a realistic cast iron finish.
Designed to incorporate traditional cast iron detailing with all the benefits of a plastic system, the Cast Iron Style Soil System completes the range providing a cost effective alternative to Cast Iron in renovation or new build projects.
Features

110mm soil pipe, soil stack shroud, access fittings and adaptors
Authentic detailing and finish on downpipe, shroud, clips and fittings
Convenient push-fit installation
Fully sealed, reliable system
Fully compatible with the Cascade Cast Iron Style Rainwater Systems and traditional cast iron
Integrates with Brett Martin Underground Drainage Systems

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Downpipe
product.description:
This Roundstyle uPVC plastic downpipe aims to create a steady path that effortlessly directs rainwater towards the pipe shoe and to the drain. Including lugs for easy and quick attachments, this plastic downpipe fits neatly into a 68mm downpipe system that settles into a corner. 
Like its fellow Cascade products, this Roundstyle downpipe features a cast iron adjacent finish that creates a rustic and traditional feel. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Pipe Shoe with Lugs
product.description:
This corner round plastic pipe shoe from Brett Martin is a member of their innovative Cascade range Equipped with lugs to ease wall mounting and installations where downpipes slot into corners, the fitting also embodies a cast iron style finish that particularly suits new and refurbished heritage buildings. 
Being that it is practically indistinguishable from genuine cast iron systems, this corner pipe shoe is appropriate to replace fittings in real cast iron downpipe systems, as well as works perfectly with the remaining Cascade items and the cast iron style soil system.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Pipe Shoe with LugsFinished with cast iron style detailsSleek and authenticIdeal for new and renovated projects that maintain heritage aestheticsEasy to install with lugsCompatible with the cast iron style soil system and traditional cast iron rangesCan be purchased in a variety of favourable coloursCost-effective and long-lasting
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 68mm Plastic Corner Shoe With Lugs (Blue)

product.name: Fernco Double Flap Backwater Valve
product.description: Safeguard your property from backwater flooding with the Fernco Double Flap Backwater Valve. Engineered to block rainwater intrusion into the sewerage system, it ensures seamless wastewater flow according to the rainwater drain's slope. Featuring stainless steel anti-flooding flaps and a clever body design that prevents blockages, it also effectively deters rodents.This versatile valve fits a wide range of pipe sizes, effortlessly integrating with diameters from 110mm to 200mm. Stringent safety testing and adherence to BS EN 13564 standards ensure reliability. Enjoy the peace of mind that comes with its robust construction and maintenance-free operation. Plus, it's suitable for foul sewerage systems, making it a comprehensive solution for your drainage needs.Features & Benefits: Fernco Double Flap Backwater ValveA double-flap backwater valve designed to prevent backwater floodingSuitable for foul sewerage systemsRainwater entry prevention ensures smooth wastewater drainageStainless steel anti-flooding flaps and blockage-minimising designsVersatile sizes for easy integration (110mm to 200mm pipes)Safety tested and BS EN 13564 compliantRobust, maintenance-free, and rodent-deterrent designStandards & CertificationBritish/European Standard: BS EN 13564

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Downpipe Clip
product.description:
Ideal for securing downpipes to the corners of a wall, this downpipe clip should be positioned near the top of the pipe with multiple downpipe clips after every metre for a fully secure installation. Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Round downpipes, this downpipe clip is ready to fit, providing a quick and easy installation.
Perfect for complementing the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, this downpipe clip is ideal for renovation projects and period styled new builds. With the authentic detailing and finish of traditional cast iron, this downpipe clip is a lighter, more affordable alternative. Made from durable uPVC, this downpipe clip is robust, non-corrosive and UV resistant ensuring a secure and reliable installation with minimal maintenance required. As part of the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Cast Iron Style Domestic Rainwater Systems, this downpipe clip is fully compatible with existing rainwater systems, the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron. Available in a range of heritage colours to match your downpipes.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Downpipe ClipManufactured to British Standards  Ready to fit making it quick, safe and easy to install  Lightweight and affordable alternative to cast iron  Available in a range of colours to choose from  Fully compatible with traditional Cast Iron and the Cast Iron Style Soil System and can be incorporated with the Deepstyle or Roundstyle Cast Iron Style Domestic Rainwater Systems  Made from robust, non-corrosive, UV stabilised uPVC  Reliable and secure installation with low maintenance requirements  Authentic detailing and finish, ideal for traditionally styled buildings, renovation projects and period designed new builds  Compatible with existing rainwater systems

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Small Ogee Hopper
product.description:
The Cascade corner downpipe system is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original cast iron systems. This system is used on the corners of properties.
The authentic styling of the round downpipe system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Pipe couplers allow for more than one downpipe to be connected in series. Cast iron connectors are sometimes decoratively branded. Plastic downpipes may, however, just join by sitting the upper pipe inside the lower, without connectors, which creates a watertight seal.
Funnel-shaped rainwater collector that diverts to a downpipe.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 68mm Corner Ogee Hopper Small (White)

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Corner Round Plastic Small Ogee Hopper
product.description:
The Cascade corner downpipe system is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original cast iron systems. This system is used on the corners of properties.
The authentic styling of the round downpipe system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Pipe couplers allow for more than one downpipe to be connected in series. Cast iron connectors are sometimes decoratively branded. Plastic downpipes may, however, just join by sitting the upper pipe inside the lower, without connectors, which creates a watertight seal.
Funnel-shaped rainwater collector that diverts to a downpipe.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Bath Plastic Hopper
product.description: Sprucing up and personalising your guttering system has never been so easy as it is with this Bath plastic hopper from within Brett Martin's clever and stylish Cascade range of guttering products. Alongside individualising your rainwater guttering system to your desired aesthetic, this Bath hopper aids your system in containing a higher volume of water to be directed through your downpipes and then to the drainage system. The Cascade range offers a wide variety of cast iron style products that can function with or replace traditional cast iron systems, perfect for builds and applications that are newer or renovated and strive for a slightly historical appearance. With architectural detailing and finish, this dated hopper is ideal for renovation projects and period-style new builds. Ready to fit, this uPVC hopper is quick, safe and easy to install and is compatible with existing rainwater systems. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Gothic Plastic Hopper
product.description: Terrific for incorporating your own personal taste and gothic style into your guttering systems while increasing the amount of rainwater that can funneled into your downpipes, this Gothic plastic hopper is certainly the item for you. Brett Martin's wonderful assortment of Cascade guttering products features an amazing array of plastic hoppers. These give you the opportunity to add some special flair to your rainwater systems with a selection of aesthetics and an even wider range of colours to choose from.
