Available in an array of colours, sizes and downpipe diameters, this hopper can be made to match your gutters and downpipes.Ideal for diverting water to a downpipe, this funnel-shaped rainwater collector is suitable for round and square downpipes. This undated hopper is an ideal authentic replacement for cast iron as a more affordable, lighter option with architectural detailing and finish and is perfect for both period-styled new builds and renovation projects. Quick, easy and safe to install, this uPVC hopper is ready to fit and is compatible with existing rainwater systems. This quality uPVC hopper is robust, fully UV stabilised and corrosion-resistant with low maintenance requirements.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Undated Plastic HopperEfficient, quick and cost-effective installation  Ideal cast iron replacement as a lighter, more affordable option with authentic detailing and finish  Available in a range of downpipe diameters, colours and sizes to match your gutters and downpipes  Ideal for traditionally designed buildings and renovation projects to match the architectural details without compromising the integrity of the heritage style of your building  Easy and safe to install and ready to fit  Minimal maintenance requirements with a secure and reliable installation  Manufactured to British Standards

product.description: With authentic detailing and finish, this hopper adds uniqueness to projects and is ideal for traditionally designed buildings, compatible with the Cast Iron Style rainwater system range. Available in a variety of sizes, downpipe diameters and colours, this hopper can be made to match your downpipes and gutters.This funnel-shaped rainwater collector diverts the water to a downpipe and is suitable for square and round downpipes. This Bath hopper has a period motif of a lion, allowing you to personalise your rainwater system and is a perfect authentic alternative to cast iron for architectural detailing with the added advantage of being a lighter, more affordable option. This ready to fit hopper is quick, easy and safe to install and is compatible with existing rainwater systems. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Four Leaf Square Plastic Hopper
product.description:
Brett Martin's Cascade cast iron style range of rainwater systems includes this Four Leaf Square hopper. It is perfectly styled for buildings that embrace heritage aesthetics, both new and refurbished projects alike, and can seamlessly replace genuine cast iron without any hindrance. The funnel shape collects extra rainwater and diverts it towards the downpipe, in turn making a helpful and stylish addition to your system. 

Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Four Leaf Square Plastic HopperPick a colour from the favourable selectionCost-effective and long-lastingDetailed with a cast iron style finishWorks as a helpful feature that adds a personal flairSuited to use with cast iron style soil systemsReplaces traditional cast iron seamlesslyPerfect for heritage buildings

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Shell Plastic Hopper
product.description:
The Cascade Cast Iron Style Rainwater System is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original cast ron systems.
The authentic styling of the Cascade system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Funnel-shaped rainwater collector that diverts to a downpipe.
Elaborate cast iron and lead versions are of great significance on many façades of historical buildings, on some old houses, hoppers took out grey water, but this is not permitted now.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron
Incorporates 65mm Square Downpipe and 68mm Round Downpipe

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Gargoyle Plastic Hopper
product.description:
The Cascade Cast Iron Style Rainwater System is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original cast ron systems.
The authentic styling of the Cascade system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Funnel-shaped rainwater collector that diverts to a downpipe.
Elaborate cast iron and lead versions are of great significance on many façades of historical buildings, on some old houses, hoppers took out grey water, but this is not permitted now.

Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron
Incorporates 65mm Square Downpipe and 68mm Round Downpipe

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Downpipe
product.description:
Ideal for channelling rainwater from your roof into your drains, this uPVC downpipe is available in a range of heritage colours, lengths and diameters to choose from and fit the architectural appearance of your building. Ready to fit, this downpipe is easy to install with the Cast Iron Style Round downpipe fittings.
Perfectly suited for traditionally designed buildings, renovation projects and period styled new builds, this downpipe blends perfectly with the architectural detail of heritage buildings with authentic detailing and finish and the appearance of original Cast Iron. As an affordable, lighter alternative to traditional cast iron styling, this uPVC downpipe is durable, non-corrosive and UV resistant ensuring a reliable and secure installation with low maintenance requirements. Fully compatible with existing rainwater systems, this downpipe can be incorporated with the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Domestic Rainwater System at 68mm and with the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater System at 105mm.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Downpipe Quick and easy to install and ready to fit  Available in a wide range of heritage colours, lengths and diameters to choose from  Made from durable, non-corrosive and UV resistant uPVC material  Authentic detailing and finish for your architectural needs for renovation projects, traditionally designed buildings and period styled new builds  Lightweight and affordable alternative to cast iron  Low maintenance requirements with a reliable and secure installation  Made to British Standards  Can be incorporated with the Deepstyle or Roundstyle Domestic Rainwater Systems or the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater System with the Cast Iron Style Round Downpipe fittings  Fully compatible with traditional Cast Iron, the Cast Iron Style Soil System and existing rainwater systemsThis downpipe is fully compatible with the Cast Iron Soil System and traditional Cast Iron. The 105mm downpipe can be part of a higher drainage efficiency of rainwater for larger roof areas ensuring a higher capacity rainwater system, making it ideal for a variety of large heritage style buildings.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Plain Pipe Coupler
product.description:
Use this pipe coupler to connect more than one downpipe in a run to scale higher or more difficult building facades. Sitting a Cascade Cast Iron Style downpipe in the top of this pipe coupler will offer a watertight seal without the need for any other fixings.
Cascade Cast Iron Style Guttering
Achieve all the benefits of plastic guttering with all the traditional and period style looks of Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering. Manufactured from plastic, the guttering is designed to look like cast iron so it’s a match to heritage and listed properties. As the plastic cast iron style guttering isn’t as heavy as actual cast iron guttering you can be reassured that installing new guttering won’t make any damage to the property.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Pipe Bend
product.description:
Available in a wide variety of colours, diameters and angles to fit around obstructions and corners of your building, this pipe bend will help direct rainwater from your gutters into the drains below, ensuring water runs vertically, reducing debris build-up. Ideal for renovation projects, period styled new builds and traditionally designed buildings.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Offset
product.description:
Allowing you to keep your downpipe as close to the wall as possible to ensure vertical water runs, this offset bend will reduce your debris build-up and keep your guttering system at a higher capacity for longer. Available in a range of colours, diameters and offset lengths, this Round style offset can fit your building needs.
Suited for period designed new builds, renovation projects and traditionally styled buildings, this uPVC offset is finished with authentic detailing making it synonymous with traditional cast iron styling, blending perfectly with the architectural detail on heritage buildings. Undifferentiable from original Cast Iron systems, this offset is fully compatible with traditional Cast Iron, the Cast Iron Style Soil System and existing rainwater systems and is a lighter, more affordable replacement for cast iron. Made from robust uPVC, this offset is durable, non-corrosive and fully UV stabilised. Quick, easy and ready to fit, this offset requires minimal maintenance and provides a reliable and secure installation.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic OffsetDurable, corrosion-resistant and UV resistant uPVC material  Available in a range of colours, diameters and offset lengths to fit your building requirements  Authentic finish and detailing for traditionally styled buildings, renovation projects and period designed new builds  Affordable and lightweight alternative to cast iron  Quick, safe and easy to install and ready to fit  Cost-effective and affordable  Low maintenance requirements with a reliable and secure installation  Made to British Standards  Compatible with Cast Iron Style Soil System, traditional Cast Iron and existing rainwater systemsThe Deepstyle and Roundstyle Domestic Rainwater System is fully compatible with the 68mm offset while the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater System is most efficient with the 105mm offset. The 105mm offset provides higher drainage efficiency on larger roof areas and ensures a higher capacity rainwater system making it ideal for a variety of large heritage style buildings.

product.variant_name: Cast Iron Style Round Downpipe 455mm Offset 68mm - Anthracite Grey

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Round Plastic 112.5 Degree Spigot Bend
product.description:
This 112.5° spigot bend helps to bring your downpipe as close to the wall as possible, avoiding obtrusions or obstacles, ensuring water runs vertically and reducing debris build-up. With a range of heritage colours to choose from, this spigot bend can fit the architectural needs of your building.
 Fitting with the Cast Iron Style Round downpipes, this spigot bend can be incorporated with the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Domestic Rainwater System at 68mm diameter and with the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater System at 105mm diameter. Ideal for period styled new builds, traditionally designed buildings and renovation projects, this uPVC spigot bend has authentic detailing and finish making it a perfect replacement for traditional cast iron styling as an affordable, lighter alternative. Blending perfectly with the architectural detail of heritage buildings, this spigot bend gives the appearance of original Cast Iron systems. This spigot bend is ready to fit, making it quick and easy to install.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Round Plastic 112.5 Degree Spigot BendMade from robust, non-corrodible and UV resistant uPVC material  Available in a variety of heritage colours and downpipe diameters to suit your architectural requirements  Authentic detailing and finish for period styled new builds, renovation projects and traditionally designed buildings  Lighter and more affordable alternative to cast iron  Ready to fit with a quick, safe and easy installation  Minimal maintenance requirements with a secure and reliable installation  Manufactured to British Standards  Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System, traditional Cast Iron and existing rainwater systems  Can be incorporated with the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Domestic Rainwater Systems or the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater system with the Cast Iron Style Round DownpipeMade from durable uPVC, this spigot bend is robust, non-corrodible and fully UV stabilised ensuring a secure and reliable installation with minimal maintenance requirements. This spigot bend is fully compatible with existing rainwater systems, traditional Cast Iron and the Cast Iron Style Soil System. The 105mm spigot bend ensures a higher capacity rainwater system as part of a higher drainage efficiency of rainwater for larger roof areas making it suitable for a wide range of large heritage style buildings.

 Fitting with the Cast Iron Style Round downpipes, this spigot bend can be incorporated with the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Domestic Rainwater System at 68mm diameter and with the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater System at 105mm diameter. Ideal for period styled new builds, traditionally designed buildings and renovation projects, this uPVC spigot bend has authentic detailing and finish making it a perfect replacement for traditional cast iron styling as an affordable, lighter alternative. Blending perfectly with the architectural detail of heritage buildings, this spigot bend gives the appearance of original Cast Iron systems. This spigot bend is ready to fit, making it quick and easy to install.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Round Plastic 112.5 Degree Spigot BendMade from robust, non-corrodible and UV resistant uPVC material  Available in a variety of heritage colours and downpipe diameters to suit your architectural requirements  Authentic detailing and finish for period styled new builds, renovation projects and traditionally designed buildings  Lighter and more affordable alternative to cast iron  Ready to fit with a quick, safe and easy installation  Minimal maintenance requirements with a secure and reliable installation  Manufactured to British Standards  Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System, traditional Cast Iron and existing rainwater systems  Can be incorporated with the Roundstyle or Deepstyle Domestic Rainwater Systems or the Deepstyle High Capacity Rainwater system with the Cast Iron Style Round DownpipeMade from durable uPVC, this spigot bend is robust, non-corrodible and fully UV stabilised ensuring a secure and reliable installation with minimal maintenance requirements. This spigot bend is fully compatible with existing rainwater systems, traditional Cast Iron and the Cast Iron Style Soil System. The 105mm spigot bend ensures a higher capacity rainwater system as part of a higher drainage efficiency of rainwater for larger roof areas making it suitable for a wide range of large heritage style buildings.
product.variant_name: Cast Iron Style Round Downpipe 112.5dg Bend 68mm - Anthracite Grey

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic 112.5 Degree Spigot Bend with Lugs
product.description:
With both left-handed and right-handed options offered, this cast iron Roundstyle spigot bend from Brett Martin's Cascade range successfully directs the downpipe of your system to the wall where it can be securely attached with the provided lugs. 
By creating a 112.5º angle, this spigot bend makes it so rainwater can easily run from the guttering down to the downpipe without any added hindrance, while simultaneously avoiding any inconvenient pileup of debris. In doing this, your system is less likely to run into irritating buildups that could interrupt the flow of water on its way to the drain. This means that your pipes will work smoothly and effectively. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Pipe Branch
product.description:
Crafted strategically, this round pipe branch works by joining two downpipes that come from different angles or directions and from there allows them to channel rainwater down to one drain. 
Brett Martin's innovative Cascade collection of rainwater guttering products takes on finishes that are synonymous with traditional cast iron and can be used as such, either replacing or joining a cast iron system. They are especially compatible with new and renovated builds that strive for classic heritage styles with all the added benefits of modern technology. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Pipe BranchExtensive colour palette with authentic detailing  Choice of downpipe diameters and angles  Roundstyle profile  Withstands potential UV damage and any tarnishing  Lightweight to ease installations and handling  Affordable alternative that looks like real cast iron.

Crafted strategically, this round pipe branch works by joining two downpipes that come from different angles or directions and from there allows them to channel rainwater down to one drain. 
Brett Martin's innovative Cascade collection of rainwater guttering products takes on finishes that are synonymous with traditional cast iron and can be used as such, either replacing or joining a cast iron system. They are especially compatible with new and renovated builds that strive for classic heritage styles with all the added benefits of modern technology. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Pipe BranchExtensive colour palette with authentic detailing  Choice of downpipe diameters and angles  Roundstyle profile  Withstands potential UV damage and any tarnishing  Lightweight to ease installations and handling  Affordable alternative that looks like real cast iron.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Pipe Shoe with Lugs
product.description:
Fitted at the base of the downpipe to change the direction of the flow of water, discharging it horizontally clear of the wall into a drain or hardstanding - which it should be positioned around 40mm above.Cast iron shoes may be decoratively branded with dates or crests.
The Roundstyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original Cast Iron systems.
The authentic styling of the Roundstyle system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Cascade Cast Iron Style Guttering
Achieve all the benefits of plastic guttering with all the traditional and period style looks of Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering. Manufactured from plastic, the guttering is designed to look like cast iron so it’s a match to heritage and listed properties. As the plastic cast iron style guttering isn’t as heavy as actual cast iron guttering you can be reassured that installing new guttering won’t make any damage to the property.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Anti-Splash Pipe Shoe with Lugs
product.description:
This round profiled anti-splash pipe shoe directs rainwater from a 65mm downpipe into the ground level drainage. Featuring the provided lugs for simple securing purposes, this product from Brett Martin's Cascade range is handy and practical. 
The cast iron style finish combines these sturdy plastic fittings with unique aesthetics that suit contemporary or refurbished builds, especially in those that feature heritage designs. Completely UV stabilised and resilient against the effects of rusting and corrosions, the Cascade collection can effortlessly substitute classic cast iron products in already established or new rainwater systems. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Anti-Splash Pipe Shoe with LugsEndless colour variety  Cost-effective  With lugs for easy installation  Authentically fashioned  Compatible with cast iron systems  For 65mm downpipes  Ready for fitting  Easy to handle and move.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Handed Pipe Shoe with Lugs
product.description:
For downpipes that don't quite reach the drainage system to expel rainwater from the guttering, this Roundstyle pipe shoe is a fantastic option to continue the path and direct the water into the drain.  
This cast iron style round pipe shoe is a part of the Cascade Roundstyle range by Brett Martin and is available for purchase as a left or right-handed fitting. Featuring installed lugs to aid with forming secure attachments to walls or chosen hard surfaces, this pipe shoe is an efficient but also stylish way of finishing off your Cascade downpipe system and therefore distributing rainfall out from your gutters and into the correct drain. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Handed Pipe Shoe with LugsAvailable in a wide colour range  Lugs for mounting  Resilient against corrosion, UV damage, and breakage  Unique and traditional finish to replace cast iron pipes  For 68mm downpipe.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Downpipe Clip
product.description:
These downpipe clips are part of the Roundstyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System, synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original Cast Iron systems.
The authentic styling of the Roundstyle system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Secures a downpipe to the wall - there should be one positioned near the top of the first pipe and then around every metre after that.
Two sorts are generally available: the saddle bracket and the barrel clip.
The saddle bracket just holds the pipe away from the wall while the barrel clip gives a firmer grip to the pipe and prevents it moving up and down.
Cascade Cast Iron Style Guttering
Achieve all the benefits of plastic guttering with all the traditional and period style looks of Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering. Manufactured from plastic, the guttering is designed to look like cast iron so it’s a match to heritage and listed properties. As the plastic cast iron style guttering isn’t as heavy as actual cast iron guttering you can be reassured that installing new guttering won’t make any damage to the property.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Adjustable Offset
product.description:
For an offset to confidently attach your guttering from the roofline to your downpipe, this Roundstyle adjustable offset is the perfect option for creating this connection and allowing the downpipe system to fix against the wall. 
This adjustable offset exists alongside the rest of the Cascade cast iron range by Brett Martin, and appropriately connects to a 68mm downpipe on modern applications that encompass an archaic building style. The finish perfectly parallels a genuine cast iron pipe, in turn making it ideal to substitute one in applications where you want a conventional design but still wish to incorporate modern-day expertise. For that much desired adjustability, this offset can be utilised in sizes from 250mm to 650mm.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Adjustable OffsetVersatile in sizing and colour for an assortment of installations and aesthetics  Durable uPVC plastic construction that won't corrode  Withstands excellently against UV damage  Easy to handle.

This adjustable offset exists alongside the rest of the Cascade cast iron range by Brett Martin, and appropriately connects to a 68mm downpipe on modern applications that encompass an archaic building style. The finish perfectly parallels a genuine cast iron pipe, in turn making it ideal to substitute one in applications where you want a conventional design but still wish to incorporate modern-day expertise. For that much desired adjustability, this offset can be utilised in sizes from 250mm to 650mm.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Adjustable OffsetVersatile in sizing and colour for an assortment of installations and aesthetics  Durable uPVC plastic construction that won't corrode  Withstands excellently against UV damage  Easy to handle.
product.variant_name: Cast Iron Style Round Downpipe 250-650mm Offset 68mm - Anthracite Grey

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic Gutter
product.description:
This Cascade Deepstyle plastic gutter by Brett Martin is brilliant for guttering installations where you wish for a cast iron style finish with all the perks of modern uPVC plastic systems. 
Ideal for following your roofline to catch rainfall and guide it to the running outlet and consequently the downpipe, this guttering has a Deepstyle profile to hold high capacities of water. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic Fascia Bracket
product.description:
Ideal for providing support for your Deepstyle Cascade Cast Iron style gutters while securely attached to a fascia board, you can choose from a variety of colours and sizes to fit your gutter system needs. An ideal replacement for cast iron, with the benefit of being a lighter, more affordable alternative.
This quality uPVC fascia bracket is ready to fit, making it quick and easy to install while being fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System. With authentic detailing and finish, this fascia bracket is designed to fit the architectural features of a traditionally designed building and renovation project, providing a heritage style while remaining uncompromised on the architectural integrity of your building. Made from non-corrosive, UV resistant and robust material, this fascia bracket is compatible with your existing rainwater system. Ideal for high-capacity semi-elliptical rainwater systems, the Deepstyle gutters provide greater drainage efficiency for larger roof areas.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic Fascia BracketAvailable in a range of colours and sizes  An ideal alternative to cast iron  Cost-effective and affordable  Lightweight and easy to install  Quick and ready to fit  Robust, non-corrosive uPVC material  Compatible with existing rainwater systems  Suitable for high-capacity rainwater applications  Authentic detailing and finish of cast-iron architectural features  Minimal maintenance requirements and a secure fitting  Manufactured to British Standards  Economical, fast and efficient installationYour Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering can easily be installed at a 12mm slope at 3m intervals for maximum water flow towards outlets with your fascia brackets fixing your gutters in place at a minimum of 1m intervals. The 170mm Deepstyle fascia bracket is well suited for commercial or residential projects and traditional churches, Georgian and Victorian shop frontage and larger period dwellings.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic Internal Stopend
product.description: With a quality uPVC structure that can be easily handled and installed, this Deepstyle Internal Stopend from Brett Martin's Cascade range has been designed to replicate the look of cast iron. It is compatible with bends, outlets and corners to close off a gutter run, which guides water to the rest of the rainwater system below. You can choose from an array of colours and diameters to match this lightweight and affordable stopend to your system. It is crafted to fit renovation projects and traditional buildings due to its heritage style. It is compatible with bends, outlets and corners to close off a gutter run, which guides water to the rest of the rainwater system below. You can choose from an array of colours and diameters to match this lightweight and affordable stopend to your system. It is crafted to fit renovation projects and traditional buildings due to its heritage style. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic Internal StopendInstallation is quick and economicalReady to fit with a lightweight structureAuthentic detailsCompatible with the Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle gutter system and existing rainwater systemsChoose from various sizes and colours Cost-effective substitute for cast ironuPVC is strong, UV stable, low maintenance and corrosion-resistantSuited to high-capacity rainwater systems with a greater drainage efficiencyMeets British StandardsThis product pairs well with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and existing rainwater systems, and it is an ideal fit for high-capacity rainwater systems to allow for a higher drainage efficiency on large roofs.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic External Stopend
product.description:
This external stop end closes off a run of guttering and helps to channel the flow of rainwater into outlets and into the rainwater system below. Available in a variety of colours and diameters to match the Cast Iron Style Deepstyle guttering with your rainwater system, this stop end is ready to fit and quick and easy to install.
As an affordable, lighter alternative to cast iron, this external stopend has the authentic detailing and finish of original cast iron architectural features. Made from robust uPVC, this stopend is durable, fully UV stabilised and non-corrosive with minimal maintenance requirements. Compatible with existing rainwater systems, this stopend is ideal for higher capacity semi-elliptical rainwater systems providing greater drainage efficiency on larger roof areas with the 170mm stopend suited for very high levels of roof drainage on a variety of large heritage style buildings. As a perfect fit for the architectural features of renovation projects and traditionally designed buildings, this external stopend provides a heritage style without compromising on the integrity of your building.
Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle Plastic External StopendCompatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System  Compatible with traditional Cast Iron (170mm stopend)  Ideal for providing higher drainage efficiency on larger roof areas on renovation projects or traditionally styled buildings  Available in a range of heritage colours and sizes to fit your architectural needs  Ready to fit and quick and easy to handle and install  An affordable, lightweight alternative to cast iron  Robust, non-corrosive, UV resistant uPVC material  Part of the Cascade Cast Iron Style Deepstyle gutter system and compatible with existing rainwater systems  Minimal maintenance with a secure and reliable installation  Made to British Standards  Safe and efficient installation

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Pipe Coupler with Lugs
product.description: Ideal for use with Brett Martin's Cascade Cast Iron Style Square-profile rainwater system, this 65mm Pipe Coupler with Lugs connects various 65mm Downpipes to achieve the distance needed between the drainage system at ground level and the guttering at the roofline of a tall building.While cast iron connectors are occasionally decoratively branded, this plastic coupler enables the upper downpipe to fit inside the lower one, ensuring a watertight seal.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Pipe Coupler with LugsWorks well with existing systemsReady for fittingAffordable and lightweight yet durablePerfect for contemporary builds and renovated heritage-style buildsBuilt-in lugs to help with secure attachmentsAvailable in a wide range of heritage coloursIntegrates 65mm Square DownpipesCompatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast IronAllows multiple downpipe connections and ensures a watertight seal UV stable and resilient against corrosion, Brett Martin's Cascade rainwater guttering system creates unwavering solutions that meet your drainage needs. With authentically detailed finishes that resemble traditional cast iron, this product is a sleek, lighter alternative that prevents any weight damage to your property and makes for especially easy fixing.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Pipe Coupler
product.description: This 65mm x 65mm Square Plastic Pipe Coupler from Brett Martin's Cast Iron Style Cascade range offers a versatile solution for seamlessly connecting multiple 65mm downpipes in a series. Unlike conventional plastic downpipes that may simply overlap, this coupler ensures a secure and watertight seal by allowing the upper pipe to snugly fit inside the lower one, while cast iron connectors are sometimes decoratively branded.As part of the Cast Iron Style Rainwater System, this coupler features sleek lines and modern styling that adds a touch of sophistication to your exterior. It effortlessly combines a quality cast iron look and feel with a more streamlined finish, offering a contemporary twist on heritage styling. Ideal for traditionally styled new-build projects, it brings authentic detailing and finishes to your home. With authentic cast iron architectural detailing, it is an affordable cast iron alternative.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Pipe Shoe with Lugs
product.description: From Brett Martin's Cascade Cast Iron Style range, this Square Plastic Pipe Shoe with Lugs delivers a secure and straightforward connection to the 65mm Square Downpipe base when positioned approximately 40mm above the drain or hard-standing. It ensures rainwater can be directed towards the drains after channelling through the rainwater system.As well as helpful for directional changes to keep water away from your wall, you will find this square pipe shoe is unproblematic when fitting, thanks to the lugs on either side. The square profile works terrifically with other products of the same profile, whether they be traditional cast iron or just cast iron in style, much like the remaining items in the Cascade range. Cast iron shoes may be decoratively branded with crests or dates.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Pipe Shoe with LugsEquipped with lugs for stabilityCorrosion resistant and UV stabilisedCan replace or work in tandem with cast iron systemsAuthentic look and feel that resembles genuine cast ironSuited to 65mm x 65mm square downpipesCost-efficient solutionAvailable in a wide array of heritage coloursFully compatible with Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast IronFeaturing elegance and modern charm, the Cast Iron Style Rainwater System not only showcases sleek lines and contemporary allure but also exudes a quality cast iron look and feel, enhancing the overall allure of your property. Perfect for traditionally styled new build and renovation projects, it effortlessly combines heritage charm with stylish flair. The authentic detailing and sleek finish add a touch of refinement to your outdoor space.

product.description: Designed as part of Brett Martin's Cascade Cast Iron Style range, this Plastic Anti-Splash Pipe Shoe with Lugs is ideal for use with 65mm Square Downpipes. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Downpipe Clip
product.description: As part of the Cascade Cast Iron Style Rainwater System, this Brett Martin 65mm Plastic Downpipe Clip ensures a secure attachment of a 65mm square downpipe to the wall, promoting stability and durability. Unlike the saddle bracket, which subtly holds the pipe away from the wall, this barrel clip provides a stronger grip, preventing any unwanted movement.For optimal performance, position one clip near the top of the first pipe and then add one approximately every metre along the downpipe.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Square Plastic Downpipe ClipFor use with 65mm square downpipesIdeal for secure attachmentsFor use near the top and every metre for optimal stabilityOffers sleek lines and modern styling as part of the Cast Iron Style Rainwater SystemBlends heritage with a contemporary twistPerfect for traditionally designed new build projectsAuthentic detailing and finishFully compatible with Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast IronAvailable in various heritage colours to match your systemWith sleek lines and modern styling, the Cast Iron Style Rainwater System not only offers a contemporary finish but also exudes a quality cast iron look and feel. The system seamlessly blends heritage styling with a modern twist, making it the perfect choice for traditionally styled new-build projects. With authentic detailing and finishes, it is fully compatible with both the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron, ensuring a cohesive and stylish integration for your home.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Rainwater Adaptor
product.description: This adaptor can be used to connect round Cascade Iron Style gutters to rectangular downpipes. Ideal for high-capacity rainwater systems with high levels of roof drainage, this adaptor assists with the flow of rainwater into the drains below. Designed with authentic detailing and finish, this adaptor is a lighter in weight and more affordable alternative to cast iron rainwater systems.Well suited for traditionally designed buildings with a variety of colours to choose from, this adaptor can be used for direct refurbishment replacement of cast iron with its period-style appearance. Made from quality uPVC, this adaptor is robust, non-corrosive and UV resistant, reducing the risk of sun damage. Ideal for traditional styled large period dwellings, Victorian and Georgian shop frontages, commercial buildings and churches, this adaptor is easy and quick to install.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Rainwater AdaptorCompatible with existing rainwater systems  Perfect for traditionally styled buildings  Designed with authentic finish and detailing  Suitable for high-capacity rainwater systems for very high levels of roof drainage on large traditionally designed buildings  Suited as a direct replacement for cast iron as a lighter, more affordable alternative  UV resistant, non-corrodible and durable uPVC material  Ready to fit with a quick, efficient and economical installation  Minimal maintenance requirements  Secure and reliable fitting  Made to British Standards  Available in  a range of colours to choose from

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Windowed Plastic Bath Hopper
product.description:
Funnel-shaped rainwater collector that diverts to a downpipe
Elaborate cast iron and lead versions are of great significance on many façades of historical buildings.
On some old houses, hoppers took out grey water, but this is not permitted now.
Features:

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings.
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron.
Choice of Ogee, Bath, Gothic and motiffed hopper designs.
Available in six colour options: Classic Black, Oxford Blue, Olive Green, Graphite Grey, Sandstone, Porcelain White.

Dimensions
Width inc. lugs: 463mm.
Height: 420mm.
Depth: 207mm.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 100mm x 75mm Bath Hopper Windowed (Black)

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic 112.5 Degree Branch
product.description: This 112.5° branch allows for the connection of two downpipes from different locations to divert rainwater into a single drain and work efficiently with the Cascade High Capacity Rectangular Downpipe system, ensuring a high capacity rainwater system for high levels of roof drainage on large heritage styled buildings.With a wide variety of colours to match your gutters, this quality uPVC branch is designed with period-style detailing to complement traditionally styled buildings while looking authentic as an ideal alternative to cast iron. Suited for direct refurbishment replacement of cast iron, this branch has the added advantage of being lighter and more affordable while remaining robust and non-corrosive. This lightweight branch is ready to fit and quick and easy to install. This rectangular branch is a perfect fit for larger period dwellings, commercial buildings, churches and Georgian and Victorian shop frontage.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic 112.5 Degree BranchAffordable alternative to cast iron while remaining authentic with architectural detailing  Selection of colours to choose from  Durable, corrosion and UV resistant uPVC material  Lightweight and easy to install and ready to fit  Suitable for high-capacity water systems for larger buildings  Compatible with existing rainwater systems  Low maintenance requirements  Manufactured to British Standards  Efficient, economical and fast installation
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style Black 100mm x 75mm 112.5 Deg Branch

This hopper is compatible with the 100mm x 75mm Rectangular downpipe with the High Capacity Cast Iron Style rainwater system.Suitable for traditionally designed buildings such as period-style new builds or renovation projects, this funnel-shaped rainwater collector helps to channel rainwater into your downpipe towards the drains below. As an affordable, lighter alternative to cast iron, this uPVC hopper is an authentic replacement while maintaining the architectural detailing and finish of your building. Ready to fit and easy, quick and safe to install, this hopper is compatible with existing rainwater systems. Manufactured from durable uPVC material, this quality Bath hopper is robust, non-corrosive and UV resistant with minimal maintenance requirements.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Lion Plastic Bath HopperAvailable in a range of heritage colours to match your downpipes and gutters  Suitable replacement for a cast iron hopper as a more affordable, lighter alternative with authentic detailing and finish  Quick, efficient and cost-effective installation  Ideal for period styled  new buildings and renovation projects without compromising on the integrity of your building to match the architectural details  Easy and safe to install and ready to fit  Low maintenance requirements with a reliable and secure installation  Made to British Standards  Width including lugs: 463mm, Height 420mm, Depth: 207mm

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Adjustable Front Offset
product.description: This adjustable front offset from Brett Martin is a brilliant way of keeping your downpipes secured to your wall without hindering connections. By creating a slanted run for water to flow through, it also prevents unwanted debris from building up and forming blockages. Manufactured from quality plastic, this adjustable front offset looks like cast iron and provides the strength of cast iron, while being lighter and easier to handle. From within the Cascade range, this offset is versatile and fends well against circumstances that could cause it damage. The rectangular profile makes it a great fit for other rectangular or square downpipe fittings. product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Adjustable Side Offset
product.description: Working efficiently with the Cascade High Capacity Rectangular Downpipe system, this adjustable side projection offset allows you to keep your downpipe as close to the wall as possible to ensure vertical water runs and reduce debris build-up, keeping your guttering system at high capacity for longer with a minimum offset of 120mm and maximum of 455mm.Made from quality uPVC, this adjustable offset has a wide range of colours for you to choose from. Well suited to traditionally designed buildings with larger roof areas, this Cast Iron Style offset combines period-style detailing with very high levels of roof drainage, ensuring its compatibility with large heritage style buildings. Designed with detail-orientated features, this authentic-looking offset can be used as a direct refurbishment replacement for Cast Iron, making it a lighter, more affordable alternative. Ideal for churches, commercial buildings, larger period dwellings and Victorian and Georgian shop frontage.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Adjustable Side OffsetAdjustable side projection offset with a minimum offset of 120mm and maximum of 455mm  Robust, UV resistant, non-corrosive uPVC material  Lightweight and affordable alternative to cast iron  Available in a wide variety of colours  Suited for high-capacity water systems for larger buildings  Authentic detailing for traditionally designed buildings  Ready to fit making it quick and easy to install  Compatible with existing rainwater systems  Minimal maintenance requirements with a secure installation  Made in accordance with British Standards  Fast, efficient and economical installationManufactured from lightweight, robust uPVC material, this offset is ready to fit and quick and easy to install. With durable and non-corrosive material, this offset is completely UV stabilised with the benefits of plastic properties while giving the appearance of traditional and period style guttering.

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic Downpipe
product.description: Ideal for directing water from the gutter-runs down into your drains, this downpipe is compatible with the Cascade High Capacity Cast Iron Style guttering system. This downpipe can be fixed with downpipe brackets. Made with period-style, authentic detailing and finish, this downpipe is ideal for traditionally styled buildings.Perfect for traditionally designed large period dwellings, commercial buildings, Victorian and Georgian shop frontages and churches, this quality uPVC downpipe assists high-capacity rainwater systems for high levels of roof drainage. This rectangular downpipe can be used for direct refurbishment replacement of cast iron with the added advantage of being lighter and more affordable while maintaining a Cast Iron Style appearance. With a choice of a variety of colours, this robust downpipe is durable, corrosion-resistant and fully UV stabilised. product.description: This Deepstyle fabricated special angle can be made to the angle of your choosing in the 'Special Instructions' for completing your order for your gutter to fit. Made from quality uPVC with the appearance and detailing of cast iron gutters to suit traditionally designed buildings, this angle has the advantage of modern plastic material with double seals, guaranteeing optimum performance.As part of the Cascade Deepstyle Cast Iron Style rainwater system, this angle is ideal for period styled buildings with larger roof areas for very high levels of roof drainage and can be used on a variety of large heritage designed buildings. Suited for a direct refurbishment replacement of Cast Iron in commercial buildings, Victorian and Georgian shop frontage, churches and larger period dwellings. Quick and easy to install with factory fitted Clip & Seal technology for completely watertight joints. Available in a range of colours, this angle is lightweight and an affordable alternative to cast iron. Made from quality uPVC with the appearance and detailing of cast iron gutters to suit traditionally designed buildings, this angle has the advantage of modern plastic material with double seals, guaranteeing optimum performance.As part of the Cascade Deepstyle Cast Iron Style rainwater system, this angle is ideal for period styled buildings with larger roof areas for very high levels of roof drainage and can be used on a variety of large heritage designed buildings. Suited for a direct refurbishment replacement of Cast Iron in commercial buildings, Victorian and Georgian shop frontage, churches and larger period dwellings. Quick and easy to install with factory fitted Clip & Seal technology for completely watertight joints. Available in a range of colours, this angle is lightweight and an affordable alternative to cast iron. Made from UV stabilised uPVC, this angle is durable and resistant to corrosion with minimal maintenance requirements.Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style 170mm Deepstyle Plastic Fabricated Special AngleManufactured in accordance with British Standards  Quick, efficient and cost-effective installation with Clip & Seal technology  Made to fit an angle of your choice  Affordable and lighter alternative to cast iron  Ideal for traditionally designed buildings  Designed with authentic detailing and finish  Compatible with traditional Cast Iron, the Cast Iron Style Soil System and existing rainwater systems  Suited for high levels of roof drainage from large heritage styled buildings
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style 170mm Plastic Fabricated Special Angle (Green)

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Rectangular Plastic 112.5 Degree Side Spigot Offset
product.description:
This 112.5 degree bend will allow you to keep your downpipe as close to the wall as possible to ensure vertical water runs. This will reduce debris build up and keep your guttering system high capacity for longer.
Cascade Cast Iron Style Guttering
Achieve all the benefits of plastic guttering with all the traditional and period style looks of Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering. Manufactured from plastic, the guttering is designed to look like cast iron so it’s a match to heritage and listed properties. As the plastic cast iron style guttering isn’t as heavy as actual cast iron guttering you can be reassured that installing new guttering won’t make any damage to the property.
The high capacity 170mm deepstyle guttering can be installed on residential projects, commercial projects and traditional church or school buildings too. The gutters are designed to hold a high capacity of water so any roofs with a large surface area can benefit from Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering. Choose between ogee, bath, motiffed and gothic hoppers to complement your cast iron style guttering and to achieve the period detailing so common in cast iron materials. The authentic-looking hoppers will give an attractive finishing touch whilst remaining affordable and resistant to corrosion.
Install Cascade Cast Iron Style guttering with a 12mm slope at 3m intervals for maximum water flow towards outlets and fix the gutters in place at a minimum of 1m intervals.
product.variant_name: Cascade Cast Iron Style Black 100 x 75mm 112.5 Dg Side Spigot Offset

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Round Plastic Plinth 50mm Offset with Lugs
product.description:
The Roundstyle Cast Iron Style Rainwater System is synonymous with traditional cast iron styling and blends perfectly with the architectural detailing on heritage buildings, being virtually indistinguishable from original Cast Iron systems.
The authentic styling of the Roundstyle system is suitable for both period styled new build and renovation projects alike.
Features

Authentic detailing and finish on guttering, downpipe, hoppers and fittings
Fully compatible with the Cast Iron Style Soil System and traditional Cast Iron

product.name: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Windowed Plastic Hopper
product.description: Crafted with authentic details and a sleek finish, this windowed Bath Hopper increases individuality. It adds some flair to your project and is perfectly compatible with the 105mm Round downpipe and the High Capacity Cast Iron Style rainwater system. Available in numerous colours, this hopper can seamlessly match your downpipe and gutters.Suited to traditionally designed buildings, including renovation projects or period-style new builds, this funnel-shaped rainwater collector channels water into a downpipe. As a reliable replacement for cast iron hoppers, this uPVC hopper is a lighter, cost-effective substitute that savours the architectural detailing and finish of your building. Features & Benefits: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style Windowed Plastic HopperQuick, affordable and easy to installMade to British StandardsColour options to match your downpipes and guttersEffective substitute for cast ironLight and cost-effectivePerfect for traditional buildings and renovation projectsLow maintenanceWidth with lugs: 463mm, Height: 420mm, Depth: 207mmIt is an ideal product for rainwater systems and is ready to fit with a fast, quick and easy installation. Crafted from strong uPVC, this quality hopper is robust, non-corrodible and UV stabilised for marginal maintenance needs.

product.name: Clark Drain B125 Ducting Access Composite Cover & Frame - 10 Pack
product.description: Clark-Drain's B125 Ducting Access Composite Covers and Frames are suitable for use in domestic driveway thresholds where family cars, vans and 4 x 4s could occur. As non-ferrous composite covers, they are non-conductive, which can prevent voltage dispersion from affecting pedestrians, especially when it's a wet environment.Available in a range of dimensions, these Ducting Access Covers and Frames are resistant to chemicals, deformation, rust and corrosion, perfect if you want long-term usage out of your covers. Their PSRV slip resistance value is 60, which means a reduced risk of slips when a pedestrian or light vehicular traffic up to 12.5-tonne loading passes over.Features & Benefits: Clark Drain B125 Ducting Access Composite Cover & Frame - 10 PackSuitable for domestic driveway thresholds where family cars, vans and 4 x 4s are regularNon-ferrous with non-conductivityPrevents voltage dispersion affecting pedestrians in normal or wet environmentsVariety of dimensions availableChemical, deformation, rust and corrosion resistancePSRV slip resistance value of 60Cover caps for keyholes stop dust and debris from enteringB125 load class ratingSupplied fitted with long-lift stainless steel locking screwsGalvanised steel louvre frame with 70mm inset depth to suit concrete, tarmac or paved areasThe frames are galvanised steel louvres with a 70mm inset depth, great for tarmac, concrete or paved areas if you want a neat and snug fitting. There are also cover caps for keyholes to stop dust and debris from entering the interior.

As non-ferrous composite covers, they are non-conductive, which can prevent voltage dispersion from affecting pedestrians, especially when it's a wet environment.Available in a range of dimensions, these Ducting Access Covers and Frames are resistant to chemicals, deformation, rust and corrosion, perfect if you want long-term usage out of your covers. Their PSRV slip resistance value is 60, which means a reduced risk of slips when a pedestrian or light vehicular traffic up to 12.5-tonne loading passes over.Features & Benefits: Clark Drain B125 Ducting Access Composite Cover & Frame - 10 PackSuitable for domestic driveway thresholds where family cars, vans and 4 x 4s are regularNon-ferrous with non-conductivityPrevents voltage dispersion affecting pedestrians in normal or wet environmentsVariety of dimensions availableChemical, deformation, rust and corrosion resistancePSRV slip resistance value of 60Cover caps for keyholes stop dust and debris from enteringB125 load class ratingSupplied fitted with long-lift stainless steel locking screwsGalvanised steel louvre frame with 70mm inset depth to suit concrete, tarmac or paved areasThe frames are galvanised steel louvres with a 70mm inset depth, great for tarmac, concrete or paved areas if you want a neat and snug fitting. There are also cover caps for keyholes to stop dust and debris from entering the interior.

product.description: Made from galvanised mild steel, this Clark Drain Aqua Knight Recessed Double Sealed Locked Manhole Cover and Frame is ideal for high water-table areas and for light-duty seal and locking. product.name: Clark Drain Ductile Iron Solid Top Manhole Cover and Frame 40mm - B125
product.description: Made from durable ductile iron and coated with a black bitumen finish, this Clark Drain Manhole Cover and Frame boasts a sturdy construction, ensuring long-lasting performance. Designed with a solid top cover that slides out effortlessly, it streamlines the fitting process and minimises concerns related to manual handling.Ideal for a variety of applications, including driveways and pavements, this Manhole Cover and Frame holds accreditation to the rigorous BS EN124-2:2015 standard, ensuring its reliability and quality. With a B125 loading capacity (12.5 tonnes), it offers exceptional strength and resilience. Its unique corner design delivers a seamless fit into the frame for the correct orientation.
